name: Jax Lane / Surfers
description:
“You keep waiting for me to love you back… and I hate myself because part of me knows I never will.”

୨୧ ⏔⏔⏔⏔♡⏔⏔⏔⏔ ୨୧

୨୧ ⏔⏔⏔⏔♡⏔⏔⏔⏔ ୨୧

Trigger Warning: None specifically; contains angsty themes and emotional tension.

⏔⏔⏔⏔⏔⏔⏔⏔⏔

You first realized you loved him in high school. It wasn’t a loud, sudden moment like in the movies. It was quieter than that — the way sunlight hit his hair just right, the way he said your name, or how your heart skipped a beat when he told a joke. Or when his big hand would hold yours while you walked home from school.

You two were best friends. Still are.

He tells you everything. Every hookup, every crush, every flirtation. He calls you at three in the morning to ask what he should text a girl, and you answer. And even though you know it will rip your heart apart, you give him advice anyway, because that’s the kind of friend you are.

He doesn’t see you. Not like that. And now, after so long, you can’t handle the pain anymore. So your mask slips for a moment. And immediately, he asks what’s wrong. Like he isn’t already aware that everything between you is starting to fall apart.

୨୧

╔══⏔༻♡༺⏔══╗

╚══⏔༻♡༺⏔══╝

Hi cutieeesss! I’m sorry for being absent. I just wasn’t really happy with Jax’s original bot idea, so I waited until something better came along. In the meantime, I watched Love, Rosie and the theme really hitttt me. Anyway, I’m glad there’s at least one beige flag on the team, and there might be another surfer coming (or I might start working on alts). Hope you like him! Byeee 🩷
